title: Quake
notes: *Quake works perfectly, QuakeWorld works perfectly, GLQuake crashes immediately, as does GLQuakeWorld.

title: Quake
notes: Quake and Quakeworld run fine, however GLQuake and GLQuakeworld do not launch.

title: Quake
notes: Quake and QuakeWorld runs, but GLQuake and GLQuakeWorld won't run. Native Linux support available outside of steam/other source ports (EX: ezquake).

title: Quake
notes: Quake and QuakeWorld runs perfectly
specs: Intel® Core™2 Quad CPU Q9550 @ 2.83GHz × 4 / GeForce GTX 650/PCIe/SSE2

title: Quake
notes: Software mode Quake and Quakeworld work flawlessly. GLQuake and GLQuakeworld are broken here, but they don't work on native Windows either (crash on start). "Completely stable" as a result. Native Linux support available with source ports such as Darkplaces, ezquake, FTEQW, and others.

title: Quake
notes: Just perfect. Already in official whitelist

title: Quake
notes: Should be played with Darkplaces instead

title: Quake
notes: Completely stable out of the box

title: Quake
notes: Quake runs. QuakeWorld, GLQuake, & GLQuakeWorld are all unplayable to different degrees. The GL brothers pop up and instantly crash out, and QuakeWorld gets stuck in the ingame command line.

Software engines for Quake and QuakeWorld work (no gamespy servers though). OpenGL variants will CTD
Recommend replacing using the darkplaces engine instead.

gpu: Intel Open Source Technology Center Mesa DRI Intel(R) 965GME/GLE x86/MMX/SSE2
title: QUAKE

notes: Works. The GL versions CTD on Windows too, so this is not a compatibility issue.
title: QUAKE

notes: Runs perfect out of the box.
title: QUAKE

notes: GLQuake and GLQuakeWorld CTD, but everything else runs perfectly with no tweaks required.
title: QUAKE

notes: GLQuake/GLQuakeWorld aren't not working. Software mode works, but i'm getting black screen after changing the workspace/focus to another program on i3wm
title: QUAKE

notes: Doesn't work at all outside of pure software mode. And although this isn't a Proton issue, it should be noted that you're pretty much Sh..-Out-Of-Luck if you have any intention of playing this with an even remotely modern control scheme (even wasd-mouse) without major hacks (ie completely replacing the entire engine).
title: QUAKE

notes: Doesn't work at all outside of pure software mode, not even if using "__GL_ExtensionStringVersion=17700". And although this isn't a Proton issue, it should be noted that you're pretty much Sh..-Out-Of-Luck if you have any intention of playing this with an even remotely modern control scheme (even wasd-mouse) without major hacks (ie completely replacing the entire engine).
